title: stachys germanica var. elata
intro: Stachys germanica var. elata, also known as tall betony, is a perennial plant native to Europe, characterized by its tall spikes of blue or purple flowers. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of tall betony include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Tall betony can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
